content: <@167734150692995072> Sorry for the wait. Aurita's EP has been uploaded, and you can now listen to it on Apple Music. Also, I realized there are over 20 albums from the past that haven't been put on music platforms yet — I'll gradually get those added, including the Ogier EP you mentioned. Thanks for taking the time to ask about it here on Discord.
Thank you so much! I went ahead and immediately purchased them. 🙂
